title: Fractured Distance
description: As you go further and further from spawn, the terrain, structures, mobs, blocks, items, and physics of Minecraft start to slowly corrupt
body:
As you go further and further from spawn, the terrain, structures, mobs, blocks, items, and physics of Minecraft start to slowly corrupt

this project was requested from the fabric discord and made to life by me!

this was a fun one to make so let me know if yall like it


if anyone needs anything add my discord: oak_and_fire
